title: Lua Method - Heartbeat
description: This page is dedicated to the Heartbeat method in Lua for Crafted Realms.

content.text: This method is called periodically during the game loop. It is used to update the game state and perform any necessary calculations.
The delta parameter represents the time elapsed since the last call to the Heartbeat method. This can be used to perform time-based operations.

function Heartbeat(delta) 
  if delta > 0 then 
    local fps = math.floor(1 / delta) 
    Print("FrameRate / " .. fps) 
  end 
end
